            (SELECT value FROM us_fed_funds_rate
             WHERE date <= CURRENT_DATE -...

queries.name: Phase 1-2: CPI Trend
queries.query_preview:
SELECT
            (SELECT value FROM us_cpi ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1) as current_cpi,
            (SELECT value FROM us_cpi
             WHERE date <= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 year'
    ...

queries.query_preview:
SELECT
            (SELECT value FROM us_unemployment_rate ORDER BY date DESC LIMIT 1) as current_unemployment,
            (SELECT value FROM us_unemployment_rate
             WHERE date <= ...

queries.name: Phase 1-4: Get Latest Date
queries.query_preview:
SELECT MAX(date) as latest_date
        FROM us_daily

queries.name: Phase 1-5: Check MV
queries.query_preview:
SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt
        FROM mv_us_sector_daily_performance
        WHERE date = $1

queries.name: Phase 1-6: Sector Performance
queries.query_preview:
SELECT
            sector_code,
            avg_return_30d,
            stock_count,
            sector_rank
        FROM mv_us_sector_daily_performance
        WHERE date = $1
        ORDER ...

queries.query_preview:

queries.name: Query 4-0: MAX date
queries.query_preview: SELECT MAX(date) FROM us_option_daily_summary

queries.name: Query 4a: P/C Ratio
queries.query_preview:
SELECT
                symbol,
                SUM(total_call_volume) as call_volume,
                SUM(total_put_volume) as put_volume
            FROM us_option_daily_summary
        ...

queries.name: Query 4b: Current IV
queries.query_preview:
SELECT
                symbol,
                avg_implied_volatility as current_iv
            FROM us_option_daily_summary
            WHERE date = $1
              AND symbol = ANY($2:...

queries.name: Query 4c: IV Range
queries.query_preview:
SELECT
                symbol,
                MIN(min_implied_volatility) as iv_min,
                MAX(max_implied_volatility) as iv_max
            FROM us_option_daily_summary
      ...

                eps_estimate_revi...
